a:coach8|tagline.text: The conductor said coach 8. The train never seems to reach it.
a:coach8|tagline.postedit: The conductor said coach 8. The train never seems to reach it.

a:coach8|p:lighting|v:dim|0.text: The cabin lights are dimmed for night, a soft amber wash.
a:coach8|p:lighting|v:dim|0.postedit: The cabin lights are dimmed for night, a soft amber wash.

a:coach8|p:lighting|v:dim|1.text: Low night-lighting glows along the luggage racks, as always.
a:coach8|p:lighting|v:dim|1.postedit: Low night-lighting glows along the luggage racks, as always.

a:coach8|p:lighting|v:dim|2.text: The overhead lights are down to their amber night setting.
a:coach8|p:lighting|v:dim|2.postedit: The overhead lights are down to their amber night setting.

a:coach8|p:lighting|v:dim|3.text: The coach is lit the same soft gold as the last.
a:coach8|p:lighting|v:dim|3.postedit: The coach is lit the same soft gold as the last.

a:coach8|p:lighting|x:flicker|0.text: The cabin lights flutter with the motion of the train, then hold.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:flicker|0.postedit: The cabin lights flutter with the motion of the train, then hold.

a:coach8|p:lighting|x:flicker|1.text: One strip of lighting stutters overhead.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:flicker|1.postedit: One strip of lighting stutters overhead.

a:coach8|p:lighting|x:flicker|2.text: The amber light trips off, then on again.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:flicker|2.postedit: The amber light trips off, then on again.

a:coach8|p:lighting|x:bright|0.text: The lights are up full, harsh and white, not the night setting.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:bright|0.postedit: The lights are up full, harsh and white, not the night setting.

a:coach8|p:lighting|x:bright|1.text: This coach is lit far brighter than the last.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:bright|1.postedit: This coach is lit far brighter than the last.

a:coach8|p:lighting|x:bright|2.text: The soft amber is gone; everything glares white.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:bright|2.postedit: The soft amber is gone; everything glares white.

a:coach8|p:lighting|x:off|0.text: The cabin is dark but for the emergency floor strips.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:off|0.postedit: The cabin is dark but for the emergency floor strips.

a:coach8|p:lighting|x:off|1.text: The lights are out here; only the aisle markers glow.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:off|1.postedit: The lights are out here; only the aisle markers glow.

a:coach8|p:lighting|x:off|2.text: Darkness, save a thin line of light along the floor.
a:coach8|p:lighting|x:off|2.postedit: Darkness, save a thin line of light along the floor.

a:coach8|p:sound|v:rhythm|0.text: The rails beat their steady rhythm beneath the floor.
a:coach8|p:sound|v:rhythm|0.postedit: The rails beat their steady rhythm beneath the floor.

a:coach8|p:sound|v:rhythm|1.text: The train hums along, wheels ticking over the joints.
a:coach8|p:sound|v:rhythm|1.postedit: The train hums along, wheels ticking over the joints.

a:coach8|p:sound|v:rhythm|2.text: That familiar sway and clatter of a train at speed.
a:coach8|p:sound|v:rhythm|2.postedit: That familiar sway and clatter of a train at speed.

a:coach8|p:sound|x:slowing|0.text: The rhythm of the rails is slowing. Are you stopping?
a:coach8|p:sound|x:slowing|0.postedit: The rhythm of the rails is slowing. Are you stopping?

a:coach8|p:sound|x:slowing|1.text: The clatter drags, as if the train is losing speed.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:slowing|1.postedit: The clatter drags, as if the train is losing speed.

a:coach8|p:sound|x:slowing|2.text: The beat beneath the floor stretches longer between ticks.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:slowing|2.postedit: The beat beneath the floor stretches longer between ticks.

a:coach8|p:sound|x:silence|0.text: The wheels have gone silent. You feel no motion at all.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:silence|0.postedit: The wheels have gone silent. You feel no motion at all.

a:coach8|p:sound|x:silence|1.text: The train sound has stopped. Dead still.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:silence|1.postedit: The train sound has stopped. Dead still.

a:coach8|p:sound|x:silence|2.text: No clatter, no sway. The train might not be moving.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:silence|2.postedit: No clatter, no sway. The train might not be moving.

a:coach8|p:sound|x:announce|0.text: A chime sounds, then a muffled announcement you can't make out.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:announce|0.postedit: A chime sounds, then a muffled announcement you can't make out.

a:coach8|p:sound|x:announce|1.text: The PA crackles with a voice, then cuts off.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:announce|1.postedit: The PA crackles with a voice, then cuts off.

a:coach8|p:sound|x:faster|0.text: The rails beat faster than they should, a rising whine.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:faster|0.postedit: The rails beat faster than they should, a rising whine.

a:coach8|p:sound|x:faster|1.text: The train is accelerating, the clatter climbing in pitch.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:faster|1.postedit: The train is accelerating, the clatter climbing in pitch.

a:coach8|p:sound|x:faster|2.text: Everything rattles harder; you're speeding up.
a:coach8|p:sound|x:faster|2.postedit: Everything rattles harder; you're speeding up.

a:coach8|p:window|v:night|0.text: Beyond the window, black countryside and your own faint reflection.
a:coach8|p:window|v:night|0.postedit: Beyond the window, black countryside and your own faint reflection.

a:coach8|p:window|v:night|1.text: The window shows only night and the ghost of the cabin.
a:coach8|p:window|v:night|1.postedit: The window shows only night and the ghost of the cabin.

a:coach8|p:window|v:night|2.text: Dark fields streak past the window, far-off lights scattered.
a:coach8|p:window|v:night|2.postedit: Dark fields streak past the window, far-off lights scattered.

a:coach8|p:window|x:station|0.text: The window shows a lit platform sliding by, a station, unannounced.
a:coach8|p:window|x:station|0.postedit: The window shows a lit platform sliding by, a station, unannounced.

a:coach8|p:window|x:station|1.text: Outside, a station platform passes, empty and bright.
a:coach8|p:window|x:station|1.postedit: Outside, a station platform passes, empty and bright.

a:coach8|p:window|x:station|2.text: A station slides past the glass; you never felt the train slow.
a:coach8|p:window|x:station|2.postedit: A station slides past the glass; you never felt the train slow.

a:coach8|p:window|x:reflection|0.text: Your reflection in the glass is a half-second behind you.
a:coach8|p:window|x:reflection|0.postedit: Your reflection in the glass is a half-second behind you.

a:coach8|p:window|x:reflection|1.text: The reflection in the window doesn't quite match the cabin.
a:coach8|p:window|x:reflection|1.postedit: The reflection in the window doesn't quite match the cabin.

a:coach8|p:window|x:reflection|2.text: Someone stands in the window's reflection who isn't in the coach.
a:coach8|p:window|x:reflection|2.postedit: Someone stands in the window's reflection who isn't in the coach.

a:coach8|p:window|x:daylight|0.text: The window is bright with daylight. It was night a moment ago.
a:coach8|p:window|x:daylight|0.postedit: The window is bright with daylight. It was night a moment ago.

a:coach8|p:window|x:daylight|1.text: Outside the glass it is suddenly, impossibly, day.
a:coach8|p:window|x:daylight|1.postedit: Outside the glass it is suddenly, impossibly, day.

a:coach8|p:window|x:daylight|2.text: Sunlight fills the window where there was only dark.
a:coach8|p:window|x:daylight|2.postedit: Sunlight fills the window where there was only dark.

a:coach8|p:window|x:tunnel|0.text: The window is pure black, a tunnel, roaring, with no end to it.
a:coach8|p:window|x:tunnel|0.postedit: The window is pure black, a tunnel, roaring, with no end to it.

a:coach8|p:window|x:tunnel|1.text: You're in a tunnel now; the glass shows only rushing dark.
a:coach8|p:window|x:tunnel|1.postedit: You're in a tunnel now; the glass shows only rushing dark.

a:coach8|p:window|x:tunnel|2.text: Nothing but black tunnel wall streams past the window.
a:coach8|p:window|x:tunnel|2.postedit: Nothing but black tunnel wall streams past the window.

a:coach8|p:passenger|v:sleeping|0.text: A lone passenger sleeps against the far window, coat over their face.
a:coach8|p:passenger|v:sleeping|0.postedit: A lone passenger sleeps against the far window, coat over their face.

a:coach8|p:passenger|v:sleeping|1.text: One passenger dozes midway down the coach, head tipped back.
a:coach8|p:passenger|v:sleeping|1.postedit: One passenger dozes midway down the coach, head tipped back.

a:coach8|p:passenger|v:sleeping|2.text: The same sleeping figure slumps in a window seat, as before.
a:coach8|p:passenger|v:sleeping|2.postedit: The same sleeping figure slumps in a window seat, as before.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:gone|0.text: The seat where the passenger slept is empty now.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:gone|0.postedit: The seat where the passenger slept is empty now.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:gone|1.text: No one is sleeping in the coach this time.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:gone|1.postedit: No one is sleeping in the coach this time.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:gone|2.text: The dozing passenger is gone; only a folded coat remains.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:gone|2.postedit: The dozing passenger is gone; only a folded coat remains.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:awake|0.text: The passenger is awake now, sitting upright, very still.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:awake|0.postedit: The passenger is awake now, sitting upright, very still.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:awake|1.text: The sleeper's eyes are open, fixed on the aisle.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:awake|1.postedit: The sleeper's eyes are open, fixed on the aisle.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:awake|2.text: The passenger no longer sleeps. They watch you pass.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:awake|2.postedit: The passenger no longer sleeps. They watch you pass.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:moved|0.text: The sleeping passenger has moved to a seat nearer the aisle.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:moved|0.postedit: The sleeping passenger has moved to a seat nearer the aisle.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:moved|1.text: The dozing figure is closer than before, on your side now.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:moved|1.postedit: The dozing figure is closer than before, on your side now.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:moved|2.text: The passenger sleeps in a different seat than a moment ago.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:moved|2.postedit: The passenger sleeps in a different seat than a moment ago.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:two|0.text: Two passengers sleep here now, where there was one.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:two|0.postedit: Two passengers sleep here now, where there was one.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:two|1.text: There are a pair of coats-over-faces this time, not one.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:two|1.postedit: There are a pair of coats-over-faces this time, not one.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:two|2.text: A second sleeping figure has joined the first.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:two|2.postedit: A second sleeping figure has joined the first.

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:speaks|0.text: The sleeping passenger murmurs, without waking: 'again?'
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:speaks|0.postedit: The sleeping passenger murmurs, without waking: 'again?'

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:speaks|1.text: From under the coat, a muffled voice: 'you were just here.'
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:speaks|1.postedit: From under the coat, a muffled voice: 'you were just here.'

a:coach8|p:passenger|x:speaks|2.text: The dozing figure says the name of your stop, though you told no one.
a:coach8|p:passenger|x:speaks|2.postedit: The dozing figure says the name of your stop, though you told no one.

a:coach8|p:seatnum|v:eight|0.text: The seat decals read 8A, 8B, 8C down the row.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|v:eight|0.postedit: The seat decals read 8A, 8B, 8C down the row.

a:coach8|p:seatnum|v:eight|1.text: Little brass numbers mark the seats: row 8, as always.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|v:eight|1.postedit: Little brass numbers mark the seats: row 8, as always.

a:coach8|p:seatnum|v:eight|2.text: The coach-number panel by the door glows COACH 8.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|v:eight|2.postedit: The coach-number panel by the door glows COACH 8.

a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:wrong|0.text: The seat decals read row 7 now, not 8.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:wrong|0.postedit: The seat decals read row 7 now, not 8.

a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:wrong|2.text: The brass numbers say row 6; you were sure it was 8.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:wrong|2.postedit: The brass numbers say row 6; you were sure it was 8.

a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:missing|0.text: The seat numbers have been prised off; bare screw-holes remain.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:missing|0.postedit: The seat numbers have been prised off; bare screw-holes remain.

a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:missing|1.text: The coach-number panel by the door is dark and blank.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:missing|1.postedit: The coach-number panel by the door is dark and blank.

a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:missing|2.text: There are no numbers on the seats at all this time.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:missing|2.postedit: There are no numbers on the seats at all this time.

a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:letters|0.text: The seat decals read 8X, 8Y, 8Z, letters that don't belong.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:letters|0.postedit: The seat decals read 8X, 8Y, 8Z, letters that don't belong.

a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:letters|1.text: The row is numbered in an alphabet you don't recognise.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:letters|1.postedit: The row is numbered in an alphabet you don't recognise.

a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:letters|2.text: The seat labels are just symbols now, not numbers.
a:coach8|p:seatnum|x:letters|2.postedit: The seat labels are just symbols now, not numbers.

a:coach8|p:door|v:closed|0.text: The connecting door at the coach's end is shut, its glass dark.
a:coach8|p:door|v:closed|0.postedit: The connecting door at the coach's end is shut, its glass dark.

a:coach8|p:door|v:closed|1.text: The powered door to the next carriage stands closed, as usual.
a:coach8|p:door|v:closed|1.postedit: The powered door to the next carriage stands closed, as usual.

a:coach8|p:door|v:closed|2.text: The end door is closed, the vestibule beyond it dim.
a:coach8|p:door|v:closed|2.postedit: The end door is closed, the vestibule beyond it dim.

a:coach8|p:door|x:open|0.text: The connecting door is stuck open, cold air rushing through.
a:coach8|p:door|x:open|0.postedit: The connecting door is stuck open, cold air rushing through.

a:coach8|p:door|x:open|1.text: The powered door won't close; the vestibule roars beyond.
a:coach8|p:door|x:open|1.postedit: The powered door won't close; the vestibule roars beyond.

a:coach8|p:door|x:open|2.text: The end door gapes open onto the shaking vestibule.
a:coach8|p:door|x:open|2.postedit: The end door gapes open onto the shaking vestibule.

a:coach8|p:door|x:locked|0.text: A red light burns on the connecting door: LOCKED.
a:coach8|p:door|x:locked|0.postedit: A red light burns on the connecting door: LOCKED.

a:coach8|p:door|x:locked|1.text: The end door shows a locked indicator that was green before.
a:coach8|p:door|x:locked|1.postedit: The end door shows a locked indicator that was green before.

a:coach8|p:door|x:locked|2.text: The door to the next coach reads DO NOT ENTER.
a:coach8|p:door|x:locked|2.postedit: The door to the next coach reads DO NOT ENTER.

a:coach8|p:door|x:glass|0.text: The glass in the connecting door is fogged, a hand-print on it.
a:coach8|p:door|x:glass|0.postedit: The glass in the connecting door is fogged, a hand-print on it.

a:coach8|p:door|x:glass|1.text: Something smears the window of the end door from the far side.
a:coach8|p:door|x:glass|1.postedit: Something smears the window of the end door from the far side.

a:coach8|p:door|x:glass|2.text: The connecting door's glass is cracked in a spider's web.
a:coach8|p:door|x:glass|2.postedit: The connecting door's glass is cracked in a spider's web.

a:coach8|p:luggage|v:stowed|0.text: A single suitcase sits in the luggage rack by the door.
a:coach8|p:luggage|v:stowed|0.postedit: A single suitcase sits in the luggage rack by the door.

a:coach8|p:luggage|v:stowed|1.text: The overhead racks hold the usual scattering of bags.
a:coach8|p:luggage|v:stowed|1.postedit: The overhead racks hold the usual scattering of bags.

a:coach8|p:luggage|v:stowed|2.text: One hard-shell case rides the luggage rack, as before.
a:coach8|p:luggage|v:stowed|2.postedit: One hard-shell case rides the luggage rack, as before.

a:coach8|p:luggage|x:gone|0.text: The luggage rack is empty now.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:gone|0.postedit: The luggage rack is empty now.

a:coach8|p:luggage|x:gone|1.text: The suitcase by the door is gone.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:gone|1.postedit: The suitcase by the door is gone.

a:coach8|p:luggage|x:gone|2.text: There are no bags in the racks this time.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:gone|2.postedit: There are no bags in the racks this time.

a:coach8|p:luggage|x:more|0.text: The luggage rack is crammed full, far more bags than before.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:more|0.postedit: The luggage rack is crammed full, far more bags than before.

a:coach8|p:luggage|x:more|1.text: Cases are stacked nearly to the ceiling now.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:more|1.postedit: Cases are stacked nearly to the ceiling now.

a:coach8|p:luggage|x:more|2.text: The racks overflow with luggage that wasn't there.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:more|2.postedit: The racks overflow with luggage that wasn't there.

a:coach8|p:luggage|x:open|0.text: The suitcase in the rack lies open, empty.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:open|0.postedit: The suitcase in the rack lies open, empty.

a:coach8|p:luggage|x:open|1.text: A case has spilled open across the luggage rack.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:open|1.postedit: A case has spilled open across the luggage rack.

a:coach8|p:luggage|x:open|2.text: The hard-shell case gapes open, its contents gone.
a:coach8|p:luggage|x:open|2.postedit: The hard-shell case gapes open, its contents gone.

a:coach8|p:table|v:coffee|0.text: A fold-down table by the aisle holds a half-finished coffee.
a:coach8|p:table|v:coffee|0.postedit: A fold-down table by the aisle holds a half-finished coffee.

a:coach8|p:table|v:coffee|1.text: The tray table is down, a paper cup cooling on it, as always.
a:coach8|p:table|v:coffee|1.postedit: The tray table is down, a paper cup cooling on it, as always.

a:coach8|p:table|v:coffee|2.text: On the table, someone's coffee, still steaming faintly.
a:coach8|p:table|v:coffee|2.postedit: On the table, someone's coffee, still steaming faintly.

a:coach8|p:table|x:empty|0.text: The table is bare; the coffee cup is gone.
a:coach8|p:table|x:empty|0.postedit: The table is bare; the coffee cup is gone.

a:coach8|p:table|x:empty|1.text: The tray table holds nothing now.
a:coach8|p:table|x:empty|1.postedit: The tray table holds nothing now.

a:coach8|p:table|x:empty|2.text: There's no cup on the table this time.
a:coach8|p:table|x:empty|2.postedit: There's no cup on the table this time.

a:coach8|p:table|x:cold|0.text: The coffee on the table has gone cold, a skin across the top.
a:coach8|p:table|x:cold|0.postedit: The coffee on the table has gone cold, a skin across the top.

a:coach8|p:table|x:cold|1.text: The cup is stone cold now, long abandoned.
a:coach8|p:table|x:cold|1.postedit: The cup is stone cold now, long abandoned.

a:coach8|p:table|x:cold|2.text: The coffee sits cold and still, no steam at all.
a:coach8|p:table|x:cold|2.postedit: The coffee sits cold and still, no steam at all.

a:coach8|p:table|x:many|0.text: The table is crowded with cups now, not one but many.
a:coach8|p:table|x:many|0.postedit: The table is crowded with cups now, not one but many.

a:coach8|p:table|x:many|1.text: Several coffees crowd the tray table where there was one.
a:coach8|p:table|x:many|1.postedit: Several coffees crowd the tray table where there was one.

a:coach8|p:table|x:many|2.text: The table is cluttered with more cups than anyone could drink.
a:coach8|p:table|x:many|2.postedit: The table is cluttered with more cups than anyone could drink.

a:coach8|p:table|x:spilled|0.text: The coffee has spilled, a dark stain spreading over the table.
a:coach8|p:table|x:spilled|0.postedit: The coffee has spilled, a dark stain spreading over the table.

a:coach8|p:table|x:spilled|1.text: The cup is tipped, coffee running off the table's edge.
a:coach8|p:table|x:spilled|1.postedit: The cup is tipped, coffee running off the table's edge.

a:coach8|p:table|x:spilled|2.text: Coffee pools across the table, dripping to the floor.
a:coach8|p:table|x:spilled|2.postedit: Coffee pools across the table, dripping to the floor.

a:coach8|p:sense|v:steady|0.text: The train feels exactly as long as it always has.
a:coach8|p:sense|v:steady|0.postedit: The train feels exactly as long as it always has.

a:coach8|p:sense|v:steady|1.text: You carry the same tired patience up the aisle, coach after coach.
a:coach8|p:sense|v:steady|1.postedit: You carry the same tired patience up the aisle, coach after coach.

a:coach8|p:sense|v:steady|2.text: Everything feels as ordinary as a night train should.
a:coach8|p:sense|v:steady|2.postedit: Everything feels as ordinary as a night train should.

a:coach8|p:sense|x:forget|0.text: For a moment you can't remember how many coaches you've walked.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:forget|0.postedit: For a moment you can't remember how many coaches you've walked.

a:coach8|p:sense|x:forget|1.text: You lose count of the carriages behind you, and it frightens you.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:forget|1.postedit: You lose count of the carriages behind you, and it frightens you.

a:coach8|p:sense|x:forget|2.text: You can't recall boarding this train at all.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:forget|2.postedit: You can't recall boarding this train at all.

a:coach8|p:sense|x:calm|0.text: You feel suddenly, wrongly calm, as if you'd already arrived.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:calm|0.postedit: You feel suddenly, wrongly calm, as if you'd already arrived.

a:coach8|p:sense|x:calm|1.text: A strange contentment settles over you that has no business being here.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:calm|1.postedit: A strange contentment settles over you that has no business being here.

a:coach8|p:sense|x:calm|2.text: You feel no urgency at all, and that itself feels wrong.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:calm|2.postedit: You feel no urgency at all, and that itself feels wrong.

a:coach8|p:sense|x:watched|0.text: You feel watched, though every passenger is asleep.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:watched|0.postedit: You feel watched, though every passenger is asleep.

a:coach8|p:sense|x:watched|1.text: The certainty that someone is behind you won't leave.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:watched|1.postedit: The certainty that someone is behind you won't leave.

a:coach8|p:sense|x:watched|2.text: Your neck prickles; you are sure you are not alone in the way you were.
a:coach8|p:sense|x:watched|2.postedit: Your neck prickles; you are sure you are not alone in the way you were.

a:coach8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|0.text: You look at the {THING} again. You aren't sure why.
a:coach8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|0.postedit: You look at the {THING} again. You aren't sure why.

a:coach8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|1.text: Your eyes go straight to the {THING}, the way they always seem to now.
a:coach8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|1.postedit: Your eyes go straight to the {THING}, the way they always seem to now.

a:coach8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|2.text: The {THING} draws your attention once more.
a:coach8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|2.postedit: The {THING} draws your attention once more.

a:coach8|adaptive|long_look|0.text: You spend longer looking than usual. You don't remember deciding to stop.
a:coach8|adaptive|long_look|0.postedit: You spend longer looking than usual. You don't remember deciding to stop.

a:coach8|adaptive|long_look|1.text: You realise you've been standing in the aisle. For how long?
a:coach8|adaptive|long_look|1.postedit: You realise you've been standing in the aisle. For how long?

a:coach8|adaptive|long_look|2.text: The train sways on, and you don't know how long you've been staring.
a:coach8|adaptive|long_look|2.postedit: The train sways on, and you don't know how long you've been staring.

a:coach8|framing|intro|2.text: The conductor clipped your ticket and nodded up the train. Coach 8, that way.
a:coach8|framing|intro|2.postedit: The conductor clipped your ticket and nodded up the train. Coach 8, that way.

a:coach8|framing|intro|3.text: That was a while ago. You're still walking, and every carriage looks the same.
a:coach8|framing|intro|3.postedit: That was a while ago. You're still walking, and every carriage looks the same.

a:coach8|framing|intro|5.text: While a carriage is exactly as you remember it, keep walking forward.
a:coach8|framing|intro|5.postedit: While a carriage is exactly as you remember it, keep walking forward.

a:coach8|framing|intro|6.text: If anything has changed, turn around. This one is folding you back.
a:coach8|framing|intro|6.postedit: If anything has changed, turn around. This one is folding you back.

a:coach8|framing|intro|8.text: Eight coaches, and you can finally sit down.
a:coach8|framing|intro|8.postedit: Eight coaches, and you can finally sit down.

a:coach8|framing|intro|9.text: Lose your certainty, and the train sets you back where you started.
a:coach8|framing|intro|9.postedit: Lose your certainty, and the train sets you back where you started.

a:coach8|framing|win|0.text: You slide open one more door, and the seat numbers read 8.
a:coach8|framing|win|0.postedit: You slide open one more door, and the seat numbers read 8.

a:coach8|framing|win|1.text: Coach 8. Your seat, empty and waiting, beside a black window.
a:coach8|framing|win|1.postedit: Coach 8. Your seat, empty and waiting, beside a black window.

a:coach8|framing|win|2.text: You sink into it at last. The train rushes on through the night.
a:coach8|framing|win|2.postedit: You sink into it at last. The train rushes on through the night.
